# BioWellth

> Functional-range blood work interpretation and cycle-aware health insights for women. Upload existing lab reports. We flag gaps against functional ranges and suggest next tests. Founded by Aditi Pillai.

## What BioWellth does
- Reads existing blood test results against functional ranges, not just clinical thresholds
- Connects blood work to cycle phase, wearable data (Apple Health, Health Connect), and symptoms
- Flags markers that standard checkups skip: free T3, free T4, ferritin, progesterone, cortisol, hsCRP, DHEA-S
- Generates a test request list for your doctor showing what was missing
- AI companion answers health questions using your actual data

## Who it's for
women who want to understand their blood work beyond "normal." Three groups: women whose symptoms have been dismissed despite normal tests, women who feel fine but want to know what their numbers actually mean, and women who want to catch problems before symptoms start.

## Current status
Pre-launch. 100 founding member spots open. Early access is free.

## Links
- Home: https://biowellth.ai
- Founder: https://www.linkedin.com/in/aditi-pillai/

## Contact
- Email: support@mybiowellth.com

## Notes
Content is static HTML, fully crawlable without JavaScript. All claims reference functional-medicine frameworks and are complementary to, not a replacement for, licensed medical advice. BioWellth does not diagnose, treat, or replace your doctor.
